inspection: Summer Beach Cozy Pack — Quality Gate Report
summary: ALL 57 sprites PASS quality inspection. The Summer Beach Cozy Pack is a sun-drenched delight — clean PICO-8-inspired palette, crisp black outlines on all objects and characters, and excellent readability at native 32x32. Tiles correctly follow tile-atlas conventions (seamless edges, no edge outlines). The pack is ready for Packager.

decisions.tile_correction: 5 tile sprites originally flagged for missing outlines are CORRECTED to APPROVED. Tiles in the 0x72 tradition do not carry black outlines on tiling edges — they use internal detail and color contrast for definition. All 5 tiles tile at 94-100% edge consistency.
decisions.sunset_correction: Sunset (atmospheric scene) corrected to APPROVED. Sky/atmospheric sprites in pixel art do not require black outlines — the color gradient itself defines the form.
decisions.beach_towel_striped: Corrected to APPROVED. Flat patterned item — stripes provide sufficient visual definition without outlines.

tiles.note: Tiles scored on tiling quality + palette adherence. Outlines waived per tile convention.

top_scorers.name: cloud
top_scorers.remark: Effortless — three colors, perfect silhouette, reads instantly

top_scorers.name: surfboard
top_scorers.remark: Lean design, minimal colors, maximum impact

top_scorers.name: seagull
top_scorers.remark: Simple lines, captures seagull essence perfectly

top_scorers.name: beach_post
top_scorers.remark: Clean vertical design, good wood grain suggestion

top_scorers.name: coconut_drink
top_scorers.remark: Tropical vibe captured in minimal pixels

notable_mentions.name: sunny_sun
notable_mentions.note: Bold yellow sun, very high pixel density. Distinctive. Passes cleanly.

notable_mentions.name: tile_boardwalk
notable_mentions.note: 100% edge tileable — masterfully crafted seamless plank texture.

notable_mentions.name: tile_shore
notable_mentions.note: Transition tile from water to sand. 50% edge match expected — it's a transition zone.

notable_mentions.name: beach_net
notable_mentions.note: Entirely black outline pixels forming a net mesh. Unusual but brilliant execution at 32x32.

verdict: ALL 57 SPRITES PASSED. The Summer Beach Cozy Pack is APPROVED with distinction for 44 of its 57 members. Packager may proceed.
next_step: Pass to Packager for asset packaging and distribution.
